description:
Stop carrying raw token bundles past the parser for extern type annotations. Extract identifier name strings at parse time.

## What to change

In ast.rs, FnDef:
  - extern_param_types: Vec<Vec<Token>>  → extern_params: Vec<String>
  - extern_ret_tokens: Vec<Token>        → extern_ret_name: Option<String>

In parser (wherever extern decl is parsed):
  - For each param type token sequence: extract the identifier name string.
  - For the return type token sequence: extract the identifier name string.

Rationale: extern type annotations are always a single identifier ("integer", "any", "nil", etc.). There is no grammar to parse — just name extraction. The tokens serve no purpose past the parser.

Note: FnClause::param_type_tokens (regular clause annotations) is unchanged here. Those still need the full combined_type_env at lowering time and are handled by fz-ty1.pip.7.

## Acceptance
- cargo clippy -- -D warnings passes.
- All tests pass.
- One commit referencing fz-ty1.pip.4.
title: fz-ty1.pip.4: extern decl tokens → strings in FnDef
